image_description: A map showing the location of Dien Bien Phu in Vietnam, near the Vietnam-Laos frontier.
learning_objective: Identify the geographical location of Dien Bien Phu.

image_description: A portrait of Vo Nguyen Giap, the commander of the Vietnam People's Army during the Battle of Dien Bien Phu.
learning_objective: Explain the role of Vo Nguyen Giap in the Battle of Dien Bien Phu.

image_description: A diagram illustrating the strategic layout of the Navarre Plan, including key locations and troop movements.
learning_objective: Analyze the strategic objectives and outcomes of the Navarre Plan.

image_description: A photograph of artillery pieces used during the Battle of Dien Bien Phu.
learning_objective: Identify the types of artillery used in the Battle of Dien Bien Phu.

image_description: A tactical map showing the encirclement of French forces by the Vietnam People's Army at Dien Bien Phu.
learning_objective: Describe the strategy of encirclement used by the Vietnam People's Army.
